arts.ttl: ‘It’s a joy to watch Barca play’ -Aguacil piles praise on Flick’s side
arts.sum: Real Sociedad manager Imanol Alguacil has been full of praise for Hansi Flick’s Barcelona ahead of tomorrow’s La Liga clash with the Catalans . Barca head into the game on a superb run of form and face a Real Sociedad team that have only managed one home win all season.

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick called another Barcelona youngster up to first-team training before Sociedad
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick afforded an opportunity to impress to another up-and-coming member of the club’s reserve setup on Saturday. The player in question? Noah Darvich. Barcelona are of…

arts.ttl: Details: Barcelona’s Lamine Yamal blew Arda Güler away in final Kopa Trophy voting
arts.sum: The details of the final voting for last week’s Kopa Trophy have on Saturday been unveiled. And they highlight the absolutely massive gap between winner Lamine Yamal of Barcelona, and…

arts.ttl: Barcelona manager Hansi Flick asks for reunion with Bayern Munich star, Real Madrid and Manchester United also keen
arts.sum: Alphonso Davies will be a player in demand in 2025, and Barcelona are one of the clubs plotting to take him away from Bayern Munich next summer. In recent weeks, Barcelona have expressed in-house doubts about the left-back position in Hansi Flick’s squad. Alejandro Balde has had a slightly underwhelming start to the 2024-25 season, […] The post Barcelona manager Hansi Flick asks for reunion with Bayern Munich star, Real Madrid and Manchester United also keen appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Possible Barcelona XI lineup for Real Sociedad clash
arts.sum: Pau Cubarsí is expected to start despite having nine stitches in a cut sustained in Belgrade and Dani Olmo may start despite the player also missing out on Saturday’s training session due to gastroenteritis. Despite the minor tweaks, Flick will field a very competitive team at the Real Arena with Iñaki Peña to remain between the posts, and despite conceding two goals in Belgrade, the young keeper still has the full confidence of the German coach.

arts.ttl: Barcelona attacker ‘likely’ to be dropped to bench vs Real Sociedad
arts.sum: Barcelona star Lamine Yamal is looking increasingly likely to be dropped to the bench for the club’s upcoming meeting with Real Sociedad. That’s according to Diario Sport, who have on…

arts.ttl: Team News: Real Sociedad vs. Barcelona injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Sunday's La Liga clash between Real Sociedad and Barcelona.

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick wants to reunite with Bayern Munich star at Barcelona
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick is eager to see one of his former stars at Bayern Munich pull on the colours of the Blaugrana next season. That’s according to German…

arts.ttl: ‘He’s an important player for us’ - Flick wants Barça to renew Iñigo’s contract
arts.sum: After an injury-riddled first season the veteran defender is finally healthy and was given a big boost of confidence by new manager Hansi Flick, who made it clear from the start that he counted on Iñigo to play big minutes and mentor the very young players around him. Flick was asked about Martínez in a press conference on Saturday and made it clear that he would like to see Iñigo sign a new deal with the club, so that the coach can continue to count on his experience and talent beyond just this season.

arts.ttl: Nike to Collab With Kobe Bryant for Barcelona 25-26 Away Kit and Special 'Mamba' Collection
arts.sum: Nike will team up with Kobe Bryant to launch the Barcelona 25-26 away kit and full collection exclusively named as Mamba collection for the 2025-2026 season.
